format.raw: fw1-loggrabber=28969 loc=4484711 time=2023-05-15_103431 action=monitor orig=172.24.254.72 ifdir=outbound ifname=eth1-01 hasaccounting=0 logId=-1 logtype=log logsequencenum=67 isfirstforluuid=0 logversion=5 originsicname=CN=DMZFWCH590001,O=FWMGTCHNGSM410..2ir8z6 uuid=64618c27,00000000,9098de82,fafff118 product=SmartDefense src=223.62.8.222 dst=211.234.112.171 attack=Application_Servers_Protection_Violation attackinfo=EMC_AlphaStor_Device_Manager_Format_String_Vulnerability SmartDefenseProfile=SBIIPSDMZ ProtectionName=EMC_AlphaStor_Device_Manager_Format_String ProtectionID=asmdynamicprop:AMSN2013012207 Severity=4 ConfidenceLevel=1 IndustryReference=CVE-2013-0929 PerformanceImpact=3 ProtectionType=IPS sport=12172 service=3000 proto=tcp sessionid=64618c27,00000000,9098de82,fafff118 ruleuid=aa9bd642-267f-4f6b-9ee1-4846272c8151 logid=2 packetcaptureid=time1684114471.id3de87f50.blade02 packetcapturetime=1684114503 packetcapturenm=src-223.62.8.222.cap suppressedlogs=1 sentbytes=1021 receivedbytes=16582

xml.raw:
<Policy>
  <Parser parser_key="{@parser_key}" type="1" separator="1,30" arr_length="49">
    <Field position="0"  name="location"          convert_tag="[[@regexGet('.*')]]" />
    <Field position="1"  name="eqp_dt"             convert_tag="[[@date('yyyy-MM-dd_HHmmss','yyyyMMddHHmmss')]]" />
    <Field position="2"  name="action" />
    <Field position="3"  name="original_ip"       org_name="orig" />
    <Field position="4"  name="ifdir" />
    <Field position="5"  name="ifname" />
    <Field position="6"  name="has_accounting"    org_name="hasaccounting" />
    <Field position="7"  name="logid" />
    <Field position="8"  name="traffic_type"      org_name="logtype" />
    <Field position="9"  name="log_seq_num"       org_name="logsequencenum" />
    <Field position="10" name="is_first_for_luuid" org_name="isfirstforluuid" />
    <Field position="11" name="version"           org_name="logversion" />
    <Field position="12" name="eqp_nm"            org_name="originsicname" />
    <Field position="13" name="uuid" />
    <Field position="14" name="product" />
    <Field position="15" name="src_ip"             org_name="src" />
    <Field position="16" name="dstn_ip"            org_name="dst" />
    <Field position="17" name="attack_nm"         org_name="attack"           convert_tag="[[@toLowerCase()]]" />
    <Field position="18" name="attack_info"       org_name="attackinfo" />
    <Field position="19" name="profile_nm"        org_name="SmartDefenseProfile" />
    <Field position="20" name="protection_nm"     org_name="ProtectionName" />
    <Field position="21" name="protection_id"     org_name="ProtectionID" />
    <Field position="22" name="severity"          org_name="Severity" />
    <Field position="23" name="confidence_level"  org_name="ConfidenceLevel" />
    <Field position="24" name="industry_reference" org_name="IndustryReference" />
    <Field position="25" name="impact"            org_name="PerformanceImpact" />
    <Field position="26" name="protection_type"   org_name="ProtectionType" />
    <Field position="27" name="description_url"   org_name="descriptionurl" />
    <Field position="28" name="policy_id_tag"     org_name="policyidtag" />
    <Field position="29" name="policy_nm"         org_name="policyname" />
    <Field position="30" name="policy_time"       org_name="policytime" />
    <Field position="31" name="src_port"           org_name="sport" />
    <Field position="32" name="dstn_port"          org_name="service" />
    <Field position="33" name="prtc"               org_name="proto" />
    <Field position="34" name="session_id"        org_name="sessionid" />
    <Field position="35" name="rule_uid"          org_name="ruleuid" />
    <Field position="36" name="malware_rule_id"   org_name="malwaleruleid" />
    <Field position="37" name="logid2" />
    <Field position="38" name="packet_capture_id" org_name="packetcaptureid" />
    <Field position="39" name="packet_capture_time" org_name="packetcapturetime" />
    <Field position="40" name="packet_capture_nm" org_name="packetcapturenm" />
    <Field position="41" name="suppressed_logs"   org_name="suppressedlogs" />
    <Field position="42" name="sent_byte"          org_name="sentbytes" />
    <Field position="43" name="recv_byte"          org_name="receivedbytes" />
    <Field position="44" name="last_update_time"  org_name="lastupdatetime" />
    <Field position="45" name="match_table_layer_uuid" org_name="matchtablelayeruuid" />
    <Field position="46" name="match_table_layer_nm" org_name="matchtablelayername" />
    <Field position="47" name="match_table_malware_rule_id" org_name="matchtablemalwaleruleid" />
    <Field position="48" name="vendor"             convert_tag="[[@set('checkpoint')]]" />
    <Field position="49" name="parser_version"    convert_tag="[[@set('v2')]]" />
    <Field position="50" name="logtype"            convert_tag="[[@set('threat')]]" />
    <Field position="51" name="model"              convert_tag="[[@set('quantum')]]" />
    <Field position="52" name="eqp_type"           convert_tag="[[@set('gw')]]" />
    <Field position="53" name="parser_info"        convert_tag="[[@set('[CheckPoint]_quantum_threat_v2_keyvalue')]]" />
    <Field position="54" name="original_log"       convert_tag="[[@originalLog()]]" />
  </Parser>
</Policy>
